creator: satosi.kimura@nifty.ne.jp
text:
Created attachment 187604
patch for sbcl 1.4.1

I could install the latest sbcl (1.4.1) to FreeBSD/amd64 10.4

1. modify original files in ports/sbcl and make
# cd /usr/ports/lang/sbcl
# patch < patch.sbcl

2. check by portlint
# portlint
WARN: Makefile: RENAME is listed in OPTIONS_DEFINE, but no PORT_OPTIONS:MRENAME appears.
WARN: Makefile: use of DISTFILES with single file discouraged. distribution filename should be set by DISTNAME and EXTRACT_SUFX.
WARN: Makefile: DISTFILES/DISTNAME affects WRKSRC. take caution when changing them.
0 fatal errors and 3 warnings found.

3. check by poudriere
 See sbcl-1.4.1,1.log shown as attachment.
